notes: Tested the full single player campaign. A few minor lighting glitches aside, the game runs flawlessly with everything maxed out on a ThinkPad X230 with integrated graphics.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: Apart from not running in full screen mode and no way to get it to run in full screen, the game runs flawlessly and very smoothly
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: Game works out the box without any issues. Running Proton 4.2-2 on a Thinkpad x230.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: Single player works perfectly. Switching to Versus mode only shows the splash image before failing/crashing.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: Runs great in single player, but its very dark even for a splinter cell game
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: Runs out of the box without tweaks. Very very slight issues with skybox being rendered infront of the map instead of in the background, but this only happen once in the lighthouse on the first map.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: The game runs perfectly with a wired PS4 controller. However, I had to set Proton to 4.2 as 4.11 make the controller mad. Xbox 360 controller never worked.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®

notes: Adding the widescreen fix allows the game to run perfectly. I couldn't test the controller support though.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®
